subcodes.first_line: Among the people are those who have turned away from the truth, following the vain imaginings of such as have been beguiled by learning, and thereby have been debarred from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: من الناس من اعرض عن الحق بما اتبع اوهام الذین غرتهم العلوم بذلک منعوا عن
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @consolation and comfort
